name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks
   \/ /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![LEFT(i)] = i]
   \/ /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![LEFT(i)] = 0]
   /\ UNCHANGED <<forks, states>> \* For all other philosophers

(* Invariant: No two philosophers eat simultaneously with the same fork *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = i

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ count < K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ count' = count + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ count > 0
     /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = NULL
          /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
             /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in readers : /\ ~(r \in readers')
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
             /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in readers : /\ ~(r \in readers')
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
             /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in readers : /\ ~(r \in readers')
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
             /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHUNK_COUNT, CHUNK_DATA

VARIABLES lostChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, chunkCount, chunkData, file

Init ==
    /\ file = CHUNK_DATA
    /\ chunkCount = CHUNK_COUNT
    /\ chunkData = [i \in 1..chunkCount |-> [chunk \in 1..CHUNK_SIZE |-> file[i][chunk]]]
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..chunkCount |-> 0]
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ lostChunks = {}

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..chunkCount :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
        /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks \cup {i}
        /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = @ + 1]
    \/ \E i \in 1..chunkCount :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ i \in lostChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks \cup {i}
        /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = @ + 1]
    \/ \E i \in 1..chunkCount :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ i \in lostChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] >= MAX_RETRIES
        /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks \ {i}
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    \/ \E i \in 1..chunkCount :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ i \notin lostChunks
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunkCount, chunkData, retransmitCount, sentChunks, lostChunks>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: clocks[i] = 0

Next == /\ \A i \in 1..N: clocks[i] = clocks[i] + 1
        /\ epsilon' \in Nat
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: clocks[i] = clocks[i] + (1 - epsilon')

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLE free, allocated, p

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \notin DOMAIN allocated
          /\ \E p \in free:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in free: p']
              /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in DOMAIN allocated:
          /\ \E p \in allocated[c]:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in allocated[c]: p']
              /\ free' = free \cup {p}

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \subseteq [Client -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in DOMAIN allocated: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[1]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[0]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
